title: Indulgent Croatian Potato Gratin
description: A rich, creamy gratin featuring Yukon Gold potatoes, a buttery Mediterranean sauce, and a crispy golden top, inspired by Croatian flavors.
instructions: Grease a 9x13 inch baking dish with butter and a drizzle of olive oil.
Thinly slice the Yukon Gold potatoes to 3 mm thickness and lay them in a single layer in the dish.
Whisk together heavy cream, whole milk, minced garlic, thyme, rosemary, sea salt, and black pepper until well combined.
Pour the sauce over the potatoes, ensuring even coverage.
Sprinkle grated Parmesan and Gruyère cheeses evenly over the top.
Cover the dish with foil and bake for 35 minutes, then remove the foil and bake for an additional 10 minutes until the top is golden and bubbly.
Let the gratin rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Optional: garnish with toasted walnuts for added crunch.
Serve hot as a comforting dinner side or main.
